headlines.description: High-flying Aston Villa were held 1-1 by Bournemouth in the Premier League on Saturday thanks to a last-gasp glancing header from Evanilson.
headlines.shortLinkText: Late Evanilson goal denies Villa important win

headlines.description: Two goals from Bryan Mbeumo saw Brentford fight back from a two-goal deficit to edge 10-man Ipswich  4-3 in an action-packed Premier League contest.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brentford beat Ipswich in seven-goal thriller

events.name: Wolverhampton Wanderers at Brighton & Hove Albion

headlines.description: Wolverhampton Wanderers' Matheus Cunha struck a superb stoppage-time equaliser to snatch a 2-2 draw at Brighton & Hove Albion on Saturday as they came back from two goals down to grab a point that lifts them off the bottom of the Premier League table.
headlines.shortLinkText: Wolves draw at Brighton with late Cunha goal

headlines.description: Manchester City's Erling Haaland scored an early goal to take the champions provisionally top of the Premier League with a 1-0 victory over lowly Southampton at Etihad Stadium on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Haaland helps City beat lowly Saints to go top

headlines.description: Substitute striker Beto headed a stoppage-time equaliser to earn Everton a 1-1 home Premier League draw with Fulham on Saturday after the Londoners had been seemingly cruising to a deserved victory courtesy of a goal by Goodison Park old boy Alex Iwobi.
headlines.shortLinkText: Beto header snatches draw for Everton vs Fulham
